model_context: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B GGUF Q4_K_S selected-MoE prefill; dominant 4K/16 prefill bucket from G-M2/G-M3

headline.interpretation: The active BF16 selected-dual Q4T16 WMMA prefill kernel is hard-clipped at 256 VGPR with 320 VGPR spills and 676 B private segment. Disabling the global unroll-600 flag does not change metadata or scratch instruction counts. Next useful code probes should reduce live state inside the kernel (e.g. split 32-column dual tile or restructure b/acc lifetimes), not re-run the unroll600 knob.
